comments: Approved. The contract scope is tightly bounded to producing exactly two design documents: tasks/v0.7-m1-protocol-reframing.md for role/core-vs-adapter protocol definition and tasks/v0.7-m1-scenario-modeling.md for Personal Mode and Team Mode workflow modeling. The allowed_files list matches that scope, and the recon packet independently confirms this milestone is design/planning only. The out_of_scope clause correctly forbids implementation code, workflow state mutations, physical relocation to .agent-state/, and modifications to existing V0.6 docs or protocol files. Stop conditions also reinforce the boundary by blocking writes outside allowed_files, any src/ implementation work, and execution without approved contract. No scope leakage or execution ambiguity detected.
